word: G4184 - πολύσπλαγχνος - polýsplanchnos - pol-oo'-splankh-nos - Very pitiful

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πολύσπλαγχνος

- Transliteration: Polusplagchnos

- Phonetic: pol-oo'-splankh-nos

- Definition:

1. full of pity, very kind

- Origin: from G4183 and G4698 (figuratively)

- TDNT entry: 16:08,1

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G4183 and G4698 (figuratively) extremely compassionate: - very pitiful.
